'''tayanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaetomin|chaetomin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-y-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaetomin|chaetomin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tayanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæyængæth|tæyængæth]] || [[word:tæyængæj|tæyængæj]] || [[word:tæyængæsh|tæyængæsh]] || [[word:tæyængæ|tæyængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tayayangath|tayayangath]] || [[word:tayayangaj|tayayangaj]] || [[word:tayayangash|tayayangash]] || [[word:tayayanga|tayayanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tayangath|tayangath]] || [[word:tayangaj|tayangaj]] || [[word:tayangash|tayangash]] || [[word:tayanga|tayanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tayafngath|tayafngath]] || [[word:tayafngaj|tayafngaj]] || [[word:tayafngash|tayafngash]] || [[word:tayafngaf|tayafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tayangatha|tayangatha]] || [[word:tayangaja|tayangaja]] || [[word:tayangasha|tayangasha]] || [[word:tayangaka|tayangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tayangath|tayangath]] || [[word:tayangaj|tayangaj]] || [[word:tayangash|tayangash]] || [[word:tayanga|tayanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tayangathal|tayangathal]] || [[word:tayangajal|tayangajal]] || [[word:tayangashal|tayangashal]] || [[word:tayangakal|tayangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tayangathatha|tayangathatha]] || [[word:tayangajaja|tayangajaja]] || [[word:tayangashasha|tayangashasha]] || [[word:tayangaka|tayangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tayangathan|tayangathan]] || [[word:tayangajan|tayangajan]] || [[word:tayangashan|tayangashan]] || [[word:tayangakan|tayangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tayangathaoro|tayangathaoro]] || [[word:tayangajaoro|tayangajaoro]] || [[word:tayangashaoro|tayangashaoro]] || [[word:tayangakaoro|tayangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
